name: font_google_families
description: خطوط جوجل للتحميل: أسماء متعددة مفصولة بفاصلة كما في موقع Google Fonts.
default: Instrument Sans, Almarai, Manrope, Montserrat, Nunito, Playfair Display

name: font_google_weights
description: أوزان الخطوط (للكل): مثل 400;500;600;700

name: font_family_primary
description: النص الأساسي — بدلاً من Instrument Sans.

name: font_family_ui
description: إعلانات وواجهة ضيقة — بدلاً من Manrope.

name: font_family_alt
description: نص ثانوي وتسميات — بدلاً من Nunito.

name: font_family_display
description: عناوين عرض كبيرة — بدلاً من Playfair Display.

name: font_family_arabic
description: العربية — بدلاً من Almarai. للخطّ الواحد للعربي والإنجليزي اكتب نفس اسم «النص الأساسي».

name: enable_theme_animations
description: تفعيل حركات وانتقالات الثيم (ظهور عند التمرير، سليدر تلقائي، ماركي، إلخ). عطّله لإيقاف كل الأنيميشن دفعة واحدة.

name: header_logo_height
description: ارتفاع صورة الشعار في شريط التنقل (بكسل).

name: header_more_menu_label
description: Header: label for the overflow menu when nav items do not fit on one line.

name: footer_quick_links
description: Footer: column title above categories.

name: footer_customer_support
description: Footer: column title above pages.

name: footer_contact_us
description: Footer: column title above contact.

name: footer_phone_label
description: Footer: label above phone.

name: footer_email_label
description: Footer: label above email.

name: footer_address_label
description: Footer: label above address.

name: footer_subscribe_emails
description: Footer: newsletter heading.

name: footer_email_placeholder
description: Footer: newsletter input placeholder.

name: footer_subscribe_newsletter_btn
description: Footer: newsletter button.

name: footer_powered_by
description: Footer: text before powered-by link.

name: show_payment_icons
description: Footer: show the store payment strip when the store has a payment image.

name: reviews_heading_fallback
description: Reviews: section heading fallback.

name: reviews_share_cta_fallback
description: Reviews: write-review button fallback.

name: reviews_count_word
description: Reviews: word after the count.

name: reviews_load_more_label
description: Reviews: load-more button.

name: reviews_empty_message
description: Reviews: empty state.

name: reviews_anonymous_name
description: Reviews: name when missing.

name: reviews_avatar_placeholder
description: Reviews: avatar letter fallback.

name: reviews_read_more_label
description: Reviews: expand long text.

name: reviews_show_less_label
description: Reviews: collapse expanded text.

name: categories_header_subtitle
description: Categories section: small uppercase eyebrow above the grid (Figma kicker). Leave empty to hide.

name: categories_header_title
description: Categories section: main heading above the grid. Leave empty to hide.

name: list_products_header_subtitle
description: Product list carousel: eyebrow when shop_label is empty.

name: list_products_header_title
description: Product list carousel: heading when section_title is empty.

name: grid_products_header_subtitle
description: Home grid (single category): eyebrow when shop_label is empty.

name: grid_products_header_title
description: Home grid (single category): heading when section_title is empty.

name: sale_badge_label
description: Sale badge: word before discount %. Empty uses platform default.

name: out_of_stock_card_label
description: Product cards: text shown on the image when stock is empty and ordering is disabled (no add button).

name: collection_items_label
description: Collection page: suffix after product count (e.g. "8 items").

name: collection_hero_decor_left
description: Collection hero: left squiggle decoration image URL.

name: collection_hero_decor_right
description: Collection hero: right squiggle decoration image URL.

name: featured_products_header_subtitle
description: Featured section: eyebrow when shop_label is empty.

name: featured_products_banner_description
description: Featured section: banner paragraph on large screens.
default: Discover our handpicked products designed for everyday style and comfort.

name: thanks_title_fallback
description: Thank-you page: heading fallback.

name: thanks_subtitle_fallback
description: Thank-you page: subtitle fallback.

name: thanks_confirmation_prefix
description: Thank-you page: text before customer email.
default: The order confirmation has been sent to

name: thanks_panda_image_url
description: Thank-you page: panda hero image URL.

name: thanks_confirmed_heading
description: Thank-you page: order confirmed heading below hero.

name: thanks_products_heading
description: Thank-you page: products column card title.

name: thanks_details_heading
description: Thank-you page: order details column card title.

name: thanks_confirmation_number_prefix
description: Thank-you page: prefix before order ID (e.g. Confirmation #).

name: thanks_label_contact
description: Thank-you page: contact information label.

name: thanks_label_payment
description: Thank-you page: payment method label.

name: thanks_label_shipping_address
description: Thank-you page: shipping address label.

name: thanks_label_billing_address
description: Thank-you page: billing address label.

name: thanks_label_shipping_method
description: Thank-you page: shipping method label.

name: thanks_label_shipping_value
description: Thank-you page: default shipping method value.
